sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65149" key="mastigono/mos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μαστῑγο-νόμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n65149.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">μαστιγοφόρος</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.553a</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
